data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Superseded by epic ace2-f784-4b19-4f22 (per user direction). RC1/RC2a fixed by 5a7548a0e (prevents new corruption); residual RC2b + store remediation (drive fsck to zero) + a true concurrent-writers+compaction repro test are owned by ace2. Closed unsigned by design — the residual is tracked, not certified here.". Session: 335612d4f.
